cross_scene_arcs.title: Hellboy and Liz's Relationship Evolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: From Liz ending their connection due to Hellboy's injuries, through his confession of insecurities and promise to persist, to accepting his dark name to save her, culminating in a romantic confirmation after her revival.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Liz bids farewell, Hellboy collapses from blood loss.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Romantic relationship confirmed with a kiss, fire haloeing them.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The threat from 'the other side' remains challenged by Hellboy.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hellboy's Struggle with Demonic Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grigory reveals Hellboy's true name and calling, leading Hellboy to accept it under manipulation to save Liz, but ultimately he rejects his destiny by breaking off his horns and choosing his human identity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Injured by Sammael, with Grigory claiming paternal role and knowledge of his true name.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Horns broken off, reverts to normal form, eclipse ended.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hellboy's Mission and Self-Sacrifice
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy departs on a Halloween mission, confronts and shoots Sammael, later entrusts Liz's safety to Myers while vowing to face threats alone, and arms explosives to be swallowed by Behemoth.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Departing for the mission with Myers, armed and ready.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Swallowed by Behemoth with explosives armed, facing an uncertain fate.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Effectiveness of the explosives and Hellboy's survival.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hellboy's Relationship with Broom and Legacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy learns of his father Broom's return, later finds him dead and mourns deeply, then wears Broom's rosary as a personal token during the final mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Father has returned, but tension exists.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Wears rosary on wrist, carrying Broom's legacy.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Integration into B.P.R.D.
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Myers arrives at the B.P.R.D. facility, undergoes verification, meets Abe Sapien and Professor Broom, learns about the bureau's mission against supernatural threats, and is assigned as Hellboy's liaison.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: New FBI transfer arriving at the gated facility.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Officially inside the B.P.R.D., briefed on the mission, and designated as Hellboy's liaison.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Relationship with Hellboy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Myers is assigned as Hellboy's liaison, assists him in combat against Sammael, is protected by Hellboy in a crash, gains authority over Hellboy's care from Broom, faces Hellboy's hostility over Liz, intervenes to save Hellboy in the catacombs, and is ultimately trusted with Liz's protection.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Assigned as Hellboy's liaison with initial meeting and nickname.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Trusted by Hellboy with significant responsibilities, including protecting Liz, despite earlier conflicts.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Liz Sherman
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Myers first interacts with Liz, arranges a coffee date that triggers Hellboy's jealousy, develops romantic feelings during their outing, helps trigger her pyrokinetic power by slapping her at her request, and is later entrusted with her protection by Hellboy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Initial glance and interaction with Liz at the mental hospital.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Deepened trust and protective duty towards Liz, with romantic interest established.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The romantic aspect remains unresolved, but the protective role is assigned.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mentorship for Abe Sapien
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Myers meets Abe Sapien and witnesses his psychic abilities; later, Broom reveals he is dying and asks Myers to mentor Abe, with Abe confirming Myers is pure of heart.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Meeting Abe and being briefed on the bureau's mission.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Assigned as Abe's primary human mentor, aware of Broom's terminal condition.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Myers doubts his own qualifications and whether Abe will respect him.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mastery of Pyrokinesis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Liz progresses from uncontrollable pyrokinetic explosions causing destruction to demonstrating controlled use and finally intentionally wielding her power to protect others.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Uncontrollable pyrokinesis leading to destructive episodes and loss
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Controlled and intentional use of pyrokinesis for protection

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Hellboy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Liz severs contact with Hellboy, expresses confusion about her feelings, but gradually commits to him, confesses her love, and after a death and revival, solidifies their mutual romantic relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Severed contact and emotional confusion regarding Hellboy
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mutual love and commitment confirmed after revival
